abilities.name: Lantern of Souls
abilities.text: Once per turn. This model must have activated once this turn. After the last enemy model to activate this turn finishes its activation, this model may kill a friendly Seishin within 6". If it does, this model gains a Slow token and may activate a second time this turn.

abilities.name: Trap Their Spirits
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 6" is killed, this model may summon a Seishin in base contact with it.

actions.name: Skinning Knife
actions.effects: If the target is killed by this action, infuse a (c).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Weigh Sins
actions.effects: Deal +1 damage if the target has an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Wrongfully Judged
triggers.text: After killing, instead of summoning a Seishin with Trap Their Spirits, summon a Gaki in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Hateful Spirits
triggers.text: Summon a Seishin in base contact with the target.

actions.name: "You..."
actions.effects: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Guide Spirit
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. Target may declare the Walk action. While resolving the action, it may move through enemy models.

triggers.name: Crossing the River Sanzu
triggers.text: When resolving, instead of declaring the Walk action, the target declares the Charge action, ignoring engagement and enemy models.
